title: The Argument
content:
Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao had been dating for a month, and things were going great.

But one day, they had their first argument.

It started when Lin Yu forgot to take out the trash.

"Lin Yu! You forgot to take out the trash again!" Su Xiaoxiao said, her voice angry.

Lin Yu sighed. "I'm sorry, I was busy studying."

"That's not an excuse!" Su Xiaoxiao said. "You always forget!"

Lin Yu stood up, his voice raising. "Well, you always leave your clothes all over the place!"

Su Xiaoxiao's eyes widened. "That's different!"

"No, it's not!" Lin Yu said. "We both have to do our part!"

They stood there, staring at each other, both angry.

***

For the next few hours, they didn't speak to each other. Lin Yu stayed in his room, studying, and Su Xiaoxiao stayed in the living room, watching TV.

Lin Yu felt bad. He didn't want to fight with Su Xiaoxiao, but he also felt like she was being unfair.

Finally, he decided to apologize.

He walked into the living room, where Su Xiaoxiao was sitting on the couch.

"Su Xiaoxiao," Lin Yu said, his voice soft.

Su Xiaoxiao looked up, her eyes red.

"I'm sorry," Lin Yu said. "I shouldn't have yelled at you."

Su Xiaoxiao stood up, her eyes filled with tears. "I'm sorry too. I shouldn't have been so angry."

They hugged, and Lin Yu felt a sense of relief.

"We're okay," Lin Yu said.

Su Xiaoxiao nodded. "Yeah, we're okay."

***

That night, they talked about their argument, and they agreed to be more understanding of each other.

"I'll try to remember to take out the trash," Lin Yu said.

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "And I'll try to keep my clothes picked up."

They kissed, and Lin Yu knew that their relationship was stronger because of this argument.

Every couple fights, and he was glad that they had worked through it.

And he knew that no matter what, he loved Su Xiaoxiao, and he would always be there for her.
